title: Stellar: Verifying circuits on Stellar with Pamphile Roy | NoirCon 3 Devconnect 2025
description:
Learn how to run a local Stellar node and deploy a ZK smart contract in under an hour.

Pamphile Roy, Principal Software Engineer, covers Stellar’s smart contract architecture, available primitives, and what’s coming in the next Stellar Core protocol release.
